# Plan: Add `image-text-to-text` Pipeline to Transformers.js

## Context

The Transformers.js library supports various ML pipelines (text, image, audio, multimodal) but lacks an `image-text-to-text` pipeline. This pipeline type is needed for vision-language models (LLaVa, Florence-2, Moondream, Qwen2-VL, etc.) that accept an image + text prompt and generate text output. The model class `AutoModelForImageTextToText` already exists in `src/models.js` (line 8736) with 11 mapped architectures, but there is no corresponding pipeline in `src/pipelines.js`.

## File to Modify

**`src/pipelines.js`** — all changes are in this single file.

## Implementation Steps

### Step 1: Add `AutoModelForImageTextToText` Import (line ~44)

Add `AutoModelForImageTextToText` to the import block from `'./models.js'`, before `PreTrainedModel`:

```javascript
    AutoModelForImageTextToText,
    PreTrainedModel,
} from './models.js';
```

### Step 2: Add JSDoc Typedefs and Class (after line 2005, right after `ImageToTextPipeline`)

Insert the following block immediately after the closing `}` of `ImageToTextPipeline` (line 2005):

#### 2a. Output type and callback typedefs

```javascript
/**
 * @typedef {Object} ImageTextToTextSingle
 * @property {string} generated_text The generated text.
 * @typedef {ImageTextToTextSingle[]} ImageTextToTextOutput
 *
 * @callback ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback Generate text based on an image and a text prompt.
 * @param {ImagePipelineInputs} images The image(s) to use as context.
 * @param {string} [text] The text prompt to guide the generation.
 * @param {Partial<import('./generation/configuration_utils.js').GenerationConfig>} [options] Additional keyword arguments to pass along to the generate method of the model.
 * @returns {Promise<ImageTextToTextOutput|ImageTextToTextOutput[]>} An object (or array of objects) containing the generated text(s).
 *
 * @typedef {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs & ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback & Disposable} ImageTextToTextPipelineType
 */
```

- Follows the exact pattern of `ImageToTextSingle` / `ImageToTextOutput` / `ImageToTextPipelineCallback` / `ImageToTextPipelineType` (lines 1943–1954)
- Uses `TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs` (defined at line 215) since pipeline needs both tokenizer and processor

#### 2b. Class with JSDoc example

```javascript
/**
 * Image-Text-to-Text pipeline using a `AutoModelForImageTextToText`. This pipeline generates text
 * given an image and a text prompt.
 *
 * **Example:** Generate a description for an image w/ `onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft`.
 * ```javascript
 * const generator = await pipeline('image-text-to-text', 'onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft');
 * const url = 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xenova/transformers.js-docs/resolve/main/cats.jpg';
 * const output = await generator(url, 'Describe this image in detail');
 * // [{ generated_text: '...' }]
 * ```
 */
export class ImageTextToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageTextToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new ImageTextToTextPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(images, text, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        // Prepare image(s)
        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);

        // Process image using the processor
        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);

        // Tokenize the text prompt
        const text_inputs = this.tokenizer(text, {
            padding: true,
            truncation: true,
        });

        // Generate output
        const output = await this.model.generate({
            ...text_inputs,
            pixel_values,
            ...generate_kwargs,
        });

        // Decode generated token IDs to text
        const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
            skip_special_tokens: true,
        }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }));

        return decoded;
    }
}
```

**Design decisions:**
- `_call` signature: `(images, text, generate_kwargs)` — matches `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline._call(image, question, generate_kwargs)` pattern (line 2743)
- Image preparation: `prepareImages()` handles single image or array → `RawImage[]` (line 91)
- Image processing: `this.processor(preparedImages)` extracts `pixel_values` — same as `ImageToTextPipeline` (line 1991) and `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline` (line 2749)
- Text tokenization: `this.tokenizer(text, ...)` → `{ input_ids, attention_mask }` — same as `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline` (line 2753)
- Model generate call: Spreads `text_inputs` (which contains `input_ids` + `attention_mask`) + `pixel_values` + generate_kwargs into `model.generate()`. This matches the calling pattern from the LLaVa and Florence2 tests (`model.generate({ ...inputs, max_new_tokens: 10 })` — see `tests/models/llava/test_modeling_llava.js:43` and `tests/models/florence2/test_modeling_florence2.js:48`)
- Decode + output format: `[{ generated_text }]` array — matches `ImageToTextPipeline` output format (line 1999)

### Step 3: Register in SUPPORTED_TASKS (after line 3255, right after `"image-to-text"`)

Insert after the `"image-to-text"` entry:

```javascript
    "image-text-to-text": {
        "tokenizer": AutoTokenizer,
        "pipeline": ImageTextToTextPipeline,
        "model": AutoModelForImageTextToText,
        "processor": AutoProcessor,
        "default": {
            "model": "onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft",
        },
        "type": "multimodal",
    },
```

- Structure matches `"image-to-text"` and `"document-question-answering"` entries exactly
- Uses `"type": "multimodal"` since it needs both tokenizer + processor

The Transformers.js library supports various ML pipelines (text, image, audio, multimodal) but lacks an `image-text-to-text` pipeline. This pipeline type is needed for vision-language models (LLaVa, Florence-2, Moondream, Qwen2-VL, etc.) that accept an image + text prompt and generate text output. The model class `AutoModelForImageTextToText` already exists in `src/models.js` (line 8736) with 11 mapped architectures, but there is no corresponding pipeline in `src/pipelines.js`.

## File to Modify

**`src/pipelines.js`** — all changes are in this single file.

## Implementation Steps

### Step 1: Add `AutoModelForImageTextToText` Import (line ~44)

Add `AutoModelForImageTextToText` to the import block from `'./models.js'`, before `PreTrainedModel`:

```javascript
    AutoModelForImageTextToText,
    PreTrainedModel,
} from './models.js';
```

### Step 2: Add JSDoc Typedefs and Class (after line 2005, right after `ImageToTextPipeline`)

Insert the following block immediately after the closing `}` of `ImageToTextPipeline` (line 2005):

#### 2a. Output type and callback typedefs

```javascript
/**
 * @typedef {Object} ImageTextToTextSingle
 * @property {string} generated_text The generated text.
 * @typedef {ImageTextToTextSingle[]} ImageTextToTextOutput
 *
 * @callback ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback Generate text based on an image and a text prompt.
 * @param {ImagePipelineInputs} images The image(s) to use as context.
 * @param {string} [text] The text prompt to guide the generation.
 * @param {Partial<import('./generation/configuration_utils.js').GenerationConfig>} [options] Additional keyword arguments to pass along to the generate method of the model.
 * @returns {Promise<ImageTextToTextOutput|ImageTextToTextOutput[]>} An object (or array of objects) containing the generated text(s).
 *
 * @typedef {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs & ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback & Disposable} ImageTextToTextPipelineType
 */
```

- Follows the exact pattern of `ImageToTextSingle` / `ImageToTextOutput` / `ImageToTextPipelineCallback` / `ImageToTextPipelineType` (lines 1943–1954)
- Uses `TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs` (defined at line 215) since pipeline needs both tokenizer and processor

#### 2b. Class with JSDoc example

```javascript
/**
 * Image-Text-to-Text pipeline using a `AutoModelForImageTextToText`. This pipeline generates text
 * given an image and a text prompt.
 *
 * **Example:** Generate a description for an image w/ `onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft`.
 * ```javascript
 * const generator = await pipeline('image-text-to-text', 'onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft');
 * const url = 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xenova/transformers.js-docs/resolve/main/cats.jpg';
 * const output = await generator(url, 'Describe this image in detail');
 * // [{ generated_text: '...' }]
 * ```
 */
export class ImageTextToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageTextToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new ImageTextToTextPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(images, text, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        // Prepare image(s)
        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);

        // Process image using the processor
        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);

        // Tokenize the text prompt
        const text_inputs = this.tokenizer(text, {
            padding: true,
            truncation: true,
        });

        // Generate output
        const output = await this.model.generate({
            ...text_inputs,
            pixel_values,
            ...generate_kwargs,
        });

        // Decode generated token IDs to text
        const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
            skip_special_tokens: true,
        }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }));

        return decoded;
    }
}
```

- Image preparation: `prepareImages()` handles single image or array → `RawImage[]` (line 91)

- Decode + output format: `[{ generated_text }]` array — matches `ImageToTextPipeline` output format (line 1999)
